description: jasig.org is the Apereo Foundation website, describing the foundation and its open source software communities such as CAS and uPortal. The pages on jasig.org are informational and link out to project code, documentation, and migrated resources on other domains.
summary: jasig.org appears to expose no public developer integration surfaces of its own: the site is an informational Apereo Foundation website, and legacy developer resources under jasig.org have been decommissioned or point to other domains/products.
